subcodes.first_line: Exalted is the All-Merciful, Who hath revealed the Bayán and heralded unto all the meeting with God, the Almighty, the All-Compelling, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی الرحمن الذی انزل البیان و بشر الکل بلقاء الله المقتدر المهیمن العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
